summary: FQ-01 player survivability loop: HUD health bar with current/max and low-health state, red damage flash, data-driven i-frames; healing via eat-food on H (consume 1 food, heal 25 below max) and passive regen only near the Town Hall with no threats nearby; collapse loses floor(25%) of each carried stack and respawns at the hall with honest messaging; new player_defaults tuning block and live-enemy contact_damage/speed/hp in data, difficulty-scaled; health_changed(health, max_health) signal; ancestry health effects and save/load preserved. Smoke 124 -> 134, all passing on a fresh windowed Godot 4.6.1 run. Orchestrated as Explore recon + sonnet implementation + independent verification + sonnet review; review's BLOCKER (spurious supply-loss message) and a rounding MINOR fixed before commit.
scope: FQ-01 only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md. Repair commit 834b531 plus this evidence-only packet commit.
next_action: FQ-02: background trees and pass-through flora.
